title: Moroccan Lamb Tagine
description: A traditional North African stew made with tender lamb and aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: Moroccan Spices
ingredients.notes: A blend of cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and turmeric

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb shoulder until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add onion and garlic to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add Moroccan spices and cook for 1 minute.
Add carrots and potatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
Add chickpeas, honey, and preserved lemon (if using).
Return the lamb to the pot and bring to a simmer.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2-3 hours, or until lamb is tender and falling apart.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs (if desired).
